channel.title: Dev Log on BoredOS Project Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Dev Log on BoredOS Project Blog

item.title: We have stopped making releases.
item.description:
No, we’re not stopping with development of BoredOS, that will of course continue. We are simply stopping making releases (eg 26.6.0).

Maintaining releases creates a lot of friction, and we often see situations like this:

user: I downloaded BoredOS and it doesn’t boot

dev: What version?

user: idk, 26.6 or something

dev: Try the nightly build

user: wow that works

This happens frequently enough that we’ve decided releases aren’t worth maintaining.

item.title: Welcome to the BoredOS Blog
item.description: What this blog is, who it’s for, and why we decided to start writing.

item.title: BoredOS: Three years of building an OS from scratch (And loving every minute of it)
item.description: The story of how a bad tutorial turned into a three-year (and ongoing) obsession.
